name: Fleet Table
func: let rows = [] for (let t of msg.payload) { let color = "#2ECC71" // softer green for NORMAL if (t.alert.includes("OVER_SPEED")) color = "orange" if (t.alert.includes("TEMP_HIGH")) color = "red" if (t.alert.includes("GEO_OUT")) color = "purple" rows.push({ truck: t.truck, speed: t.speed, Temp: t.temp, RPM: t.rpm, Distance: t.distance_km, Alert: `${t.alert}` }) } msg.payload = rows return msg

name: Fleet Processor
Fleet summary
template:
Fleet Summary

Total Trucks: {{msg.payload.total}}
Overspeed Trucks: {{msg.payload.overspeed}}
High Temperature: {{msg.payload.hightemp}}

Fleet Management Table

name: Speed  Distribuition Chart
Top Problem Trucks
